data.name: Love Island
data.detailed_description:
Tired of the hustle and bustle? Take a tour to Love Island - catch 'em all, bang 'em all! Warm sea and tropical heat. Exotic cocktails and beach sex. What could possibly go wrong? But... It's not so easy to seduce the girls on Love Island. They'll try to push you away, shattering your confidence, which could lead to a broken heart, ending up in the friend zone, impotence, suicide, or testicular cancer, or maybe all of the above.



If your confidence drops to 0, damage will be irreparable! Remember, seduction is not only PLEASURABLE but also DANGEROUS TO YOUR LIFE, so it's important to exercise CAUTION! Find your way into the hearts of 5 beauties and unlock over 25 beautifully animated erotic CG scenes.



This game may contain content not suitable for all ages or for viewing at work: nudity or sexual scenes, adult content including domination scenes, oral and anal sex, foot fetish, and defloration.

data.short_description: Tired of the hustle and bustle? Take a tour to Love Island - catch 'em all, bang 'em all! Play this match-three game with RPG elements to seduce all those charming anime girls!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 日文, 韓文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: 64 Bit Windows 7, 8, 10 or 11
  • 處理器: 2.6 GHz Intel® Core™ i5-750 or 3.2 GHz AMD Phenom™ II X4 955
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 460 or AMD Radeon HD5850
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: 64 Bit Windows 7, 8, 10 or 11
  • Processor: 2.6 GHz Intel® Core™ i5-750 or 3.2 GHz AMD Phenom™ II X4 955
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 460 or AMD Radeon HD5850
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
